recommendations.title: Lord, Give Me Patience
recommendations.overview: An ultraconservative family father must spend a weekend with his dysfunctional children for the burial of his wife.

recommendations.title: The Echo
recommendations.overview: An ex-prisoner moves to an old apartment, where one gets to see in the middle of a domestic problem between a police officer, his wife and his daughter. When he tries to intervene, he will be caught in a mysterious curse.

recommendations.title: After.Life
recommendations.overview: Following a terrible car crash, a woman awakes to find an enigmatic mortician preparing her for burial.

recommendations.title: Final Exam
recommendations.overview: In a small college in North Carolina, only a select few students are left to take mid terms. But, when a killer strikes, it could be everyone's final exam.

recommendations.title: Altar
recommendations.overview: A young family find themselves in serious danger when they move to an isolated haunted house in the Yorkshire Moors.

recommendations.title: The Premature Burial
recommendations.overview: An artist grows distant from his new wife as an irrational fear of premature burial consumes him.

recommendations.title: Out of the Dark
recommendations.overview: A couple and their daughter moves to Colombia to take over a family manufacturing plant, only to realize their new home is haunted.

recommendations.title: Don't Knock Twice
recommendations.overview: A mother desperate to reconnect with her troubled daughter becomes embroiled in the urban legend of a demonic witch.

recommendations.title: The Goldsmith
recommendations.overview: Determined to rob a goldsmith, three young robbers break into his country house. The man and his wife turn out to be less defenseless than they seem.

recommendations.title: The Evil Next Door
recommendations.overview: A dad moves into a new house with his son and girlfriend. When he's out of town working, the son makes a new "friend" next doors.
